response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video and identified two distinct musical performances separated by a dialogue intermission. 2. Identified Song 1 via on-screen text as 'Kimi Master!'. Performed search for '[Song Title] Japanese and English lyrics' and found it to be a song originally by the group 'Band Ja Naimon!'. 3. Identified Song 2 via on-screen text as 'Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!' with credit to 'Masayoshi Oishi'. Performed search for '[Song Title] Masayoshi Oishi Japanese and English lyrics' and confirmed it as the theme song for the 'Umamusume Pretty Derby' movie. 4. Generated the final JSON structure with descriptions, metadata, and placeholder for lyrics content.
response.global_summary: The video features a 3D musical performance by the Hololive VTuber group known as "Nene-Pora-Bo" (Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, and Yukihana Lamy). It starts with a performance of the song "Kimi Master!", followed by an intermission where the members discuss and decide on their band roles for the next performance. The video concludes with a performance of "Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!".

scenes.description: The four VTubers perform the song 'Kimi Master!'. Title text is visible at 00:00.
The members engage in a dialogue segment to discuss and assign roles for their band performance.
The four VTubers perform the song 'Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!'. Title text and credits are visible at 03:45.
